messages.content: edit: Thank you for your reply.  I appreciate your help and Christina's help and Jenny's help,

and I am grateful for the support you have provided. Your dedication and commitment to assisting me have made a significant difference, and I am happy to work with a team who cares about helping others. Thank you again for your valuable assistance!
revise this text: I appreciate your help and Christina's help and Jenny's help,
I appreciate the help you, Christina, and Jenny provided.

edit: Hi Denitsa,


Thank you for your reply.

Thank you, Kristina, and Jenny!

Best regards,
Great job! Your message is clear and polite.

how answer to this email: thank You for the mail!

Kristina already posted the invitation on the 9th May, I saw.
Jenny will post it today on our two virtual platforms for the seminars.

Best regards

Dear [Name],

Thank you for letting me know that Kristina already posted the invitation on May 9th and that Jenny will post it today on our other virtual platforms. I appreciate the updates and the effort your team is putting in to ensure a successful seminar. 

Best regards, 
[Your Name]

edit: Thank you for your reply.

Thank you very much, Kristina, and Jenny!
Great job! Your reply is clear and expresses gratitude.

edit: I am currently working on the following papers which mainly joint reperches with University of Hagen Germany.    
I think for start joint resech need to have an opportunity as a visting researcher

I am currently working on joint research papers with the University of Hagen, Germany. I believe that, in order to initiate our joint research, the possibility of working as a visiting researcher needs to be considered.
edit: My current works are as follows. Of course I can start a new work  with you
Here are my current works. However, I am open to starting a new project with you.
